title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The match of the century's about to begin—the
kind of showdown you'll only find at the Japan
Cup!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
There's only one question on everyone's
mind—Mihono Bourbon or Tokai Teio? Who's it
gonna be today?!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be Teio, right? She's been out of the
game for a bit, but she's a prodigy.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
No way, Mihono Bourbon's gonna prove you
wrong! Don't you remember the spring Tenno
Sho?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Argh, I'm so nervous that I can't bear to watch!

Everyone in the stands is waiting with bated
breath for the competition between Tokai Teio
and Mihono Bourbon.
Meanwhile, in the runners' tunnel...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Bourbon! Let's have a good race!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Indeed.

Tokai Teio stares at Mihono Bourbon's
outstretched hand.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I've only just recovered from my
injury, so I was feeling nervous about running
today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But when I watched the spring Tenno Sho... I kind
of just... suddenly got this liberating feeling.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I already knew all about you because I
did a bunch of research, but I realized that none
of that junk matters!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All I wanna do is race against you!
She firmly grips Mihono Bourbon's hand.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm honored to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, the honor's all mine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: See you at the paddock, then!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I think I finally understand what Rice meant when
she said she wanted to "catch up" to me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'll be off now, Trainer.
And so, the highly anticipated Japan Cup begins!
